missing_partition_runbook.when_to_use: Use when an Airflow task fails because a required source partition is missing.
diagnosis_steps: Check whether the expected source partition exists.
Verify upstream load completion markers and freshness.
Confirm downstream task has not already partially written target data.
fix_steps: Trigger or request the upstream backfill for the missing partition.
Rerun from the failed transform task after the partition is available.
Validate target row counts and dashboard freshness.
missing_partition_runbook.prevention: Add a source partition availability sensor before the transform task.

row_count_mismatch_runbook.when_to_use: Use when source and target row counts diverge after a data load.
diagnosis_steps: Compare source and target counts for the same processing window.
Check for late source records and partial downstream writes.
fix_steps: Rerun validation after source load finalization.
row_count_mismatch_runbook.prevention: Gate validation on upstream completion markers.

schema_drift_runbook.when_to_use: Use when source data columns are missing, added, or change type.
diagnosis_steps: Compare incoming schema with the documented contract.
Contact the source owner for change intent and rollout timing.
fix_steps: Update schema mapping if the change is approved.
Reject or quarantine incompatible files until the contract is updated.
schema_drift_runbook.prevention: Run schema contract checks before loading data.
